mapper.select: /*AdminBoard_SQL.selectAdminNoticeEffectList*/ SELECT COMM_CD , COMM_NM FROM TB_COMMON_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND COMM_GROUP_CD = 'NOTICE' AND COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND COMM_DEL_YN = 'N' AND COMM_LVL = 1

/*AdminBoard_SQL.selectAdminNoticeInfo*/ SELECT NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TITLE , NOTICE_EFFECT_GB , NOTICE_CN , NOTICE_FIX_YN , NOTICE_LIMIT_YN , NOTICE_STR_DT , NOTICE_END_DT , NOTICE_FINISH_YN , NOTICE_DEL_YN , NOTICE_POP_YN , REG_ID , TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MM:SS') AS REG_DT , UPD_ID , UPD_DT FROM TB_NOTICE_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId} AND NOTICE_DEL_YN = 'N'

/*AdminBoard_SQL.selectAdminNoticeFiles*/ SELECT FILE_ID , FILE_ORG_NM , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , REF_TYPE , REF_ID , FILE_THUMB_NM , FILE_THUMB_PATH , REG_ID , REG_DT , UPD_ID , UPD_DT FROM TB_FILE_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND REF_TYPE = 'NOTICE' AND REF_ID = #{noticeId}

/*AdminBoard_SQL.selectNoticeFilesForDelete*/ SELECT FILE_ID , FILE_ORG_NM , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , REF_TYPE , REF_ID , FILE_THUMB_NM , FILE_THUMB_PATH FROM TB_FILE_INFO WHERE REF_ID = #{noticeId} AND REF_TYPE = 'NOTICE' AND FILE_ID IN
#{deleteId}

/*AdminBoard_SQL.selectNoticeFileInfo*/ SELECT FILE_ID , FILE_ORG_NM , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , REF_TYPE , REF_ID , FILE_THUMB_NM , FILE_THUMB_PATH FROM TB_FILE_INFO WHERE REF_ID = #{noticeId} AND REF_TYPE = 'NOTICE'
